title: ferray-polynomial: integ_with_bounds for non-power bases
description: Follow-up from #482. Polynomial (power basis) ships integ_with_bounds(m, k, lbnd, scl). Extend to Chebyshev / Hermite / HermiteE / Legendre / Laguerre. The recurrence-based step needs the basis-specific evaluate-at-lbnd routine to compute the integration-constant offset. Match numpy's <basis>polyint signatures.
